creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2008-06-06 13:23:00 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    dns/bind9-dlz        Makefile 
    dns/crossip          Makefile 
    dns/dnsjava          Makefile 
    dns/gresolver        Makefile 
    dns/libidn           Makefile 
    dns/mydns            Makefile 
    dns/nss_mdns         Makefile 
    dns/p5-Net-LibIDN    Makefile 
    dns/powerdns         Makefile 
    dns/powerdns-devel   Makefile 
    dns/sqldjbdns        Makefile 
    dns/staticcharge     Makefile 
  Log:
  Bump portrevision due to upgrade of devel/gettext.
  
  The affected ports are the ones with gettext as a run-dependency
  according to ports/INDEX-7 (5007 of them) and the ones with USE_GETTEXT
  in Makefile (29 of them).
  
  PR:             ports/124340
  Submitted by:   edwin@
  Approved by:    portmgr (pav)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.44      +1 -0      ports/dns/bind9-dlz/Makefile
  1.5       +1 -1      ports/dns/crossip/Makefile
  1.7       +1 -0      ports/dns/dnsjava/Makefile
  1.15      +1 -1      ports/dns/gresolver/Makefile
  1.70      +1 -0      ports/dns/libidn/Makefile
  1.44      +1 -1      ports/dns/mydns/Makefile
  1.9       +1 -1      ports/dns/nss_mdns/Makefile
  1.15      +1 -0      ports/dns/p5-Net-LibIDN/Makefile
  1.61      +1 -0      ports/dns/powerdns-devel/Makefile
  1.61      +1 -0      ports/dns/powerdns/Makefile
  1.8       +1 -0      ports/dns/sqldjbdns/Makefile
